summary: Add a Keywords field to whichEntry and keyword scoring so advertised SKILL trigger phrases resolve in `which`.
reason: `which "who owes me money"` returned no match (exit 2) even though that phrase is an advertised SKILL.md trigger. The curated whichIndex matched only on command/description/group text. Added whichEntry.Keywords plus keyword scoring (+3 full-query phrase match, +1 per query token found in a keyword) and populated keywords for the curated entries; backward compatible since nil-keyword entries score nothing extra.
validated_outcome: Live: `which "who owes me money"` now returns debts (score 3) at exit 0; `which "venmo"` returns settle-up.
